scripts.build: npm run clean:sites && npm run build:min && npm run build:css && WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log vite build
scripts.test: npm run test:identity && npm run build && node --test tests/sites-worker.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check identityProfiles.js && node --check identityAnalysis.js && node --check app.min.js && node scripts/build-min.mjs --check && node scripts/build-css.mjs --check && npm test
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:e2e
